arts.ttl: 'You could tell': David Seaman says £75k-a-week Tottenham player has been well and truly sussed out
arts.sum: Arsenal are back on track after getting the better of Tottenham Hotspur in Sunday’s North London derby. The Gunners had stumbled slightly just before the...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid planning Premier League raid with Arsenal and Tottenham stars being eyed
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s transfer plans could be bad news for Premier League clubs Arsenal and Tottenham. When the La Liga giants come for a player, they hardly fail to get what they want. Real Madrid’s knock is different compared to all other clubs, with the Spanish giants boasting a history of success on in all competitions. arts.ttl: Coventry vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham's 2024/25 trophy hunt begins on Wednesday night as they take on Championship side Coventry in the third round of the Carabao Cup. Their unproductive start and the club's desperation to finally claim silverware mean Wednesday's game is a pretty significant one for Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Manor Solomon mistake, strange Alejo Veliz stat as Tottenham starlet prepares to face Man Utd
arts.sum: Ashley Phillips was an unused substitute for Stoke in their 1-0 defeat at Oxford United in the Championship, having played in the previous two games for the Potters before the international break. football.london has taken a look below at exactly how the rest of the group of Spurs loan players got on over the past week.

Ange Postecoglou was keen to remind everyone of his track record in the wake of a disappointing north London derby defeat, and Tottenham's (serious) hunt for a trophy begins on Wednesday night as they face Championship side Coventry in the third round of the Carabao Cup. Postecoglou's Spurs endured a second round exit in this competition last time out, but it must be viewed as a piece of silverware the trophy-shy club can genuinely get their hands on next February.

arts.ttl: Coventry star Brandon Thomas-Asante out to spoil Ange Postecoglou vow in Spurs cup clash
arts.sum: Coventry City forward Brandon Thomas-Asante is determined to pile even more misery on Tottenham following their loss in the North London derby when the two sides meet on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Tottenham team news vs Coventry as Ange Postecoglou plots changes for Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: Spurs will be hoping to get back to winning ways following Sunday's defeat to Arsenal in the North London derby

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to backlash over second season trophy comments
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou has hit out at the backlash for stating that he always wins a trophy in his second season at a club, insisting it is just a "true" statement. I've answered a question, which is true, and [winning a trophy in the second year] has always happened.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Tottenham 'failure' admission as he doubles down on trophy claim
arts.sum: Spurs will be aiming to put Sunday's defeat to Arsenal in the North London derby behind them when they travel to Coventry in the Carabao Cup

arts.sum: Tottenham have struggled at the start of the Premier League season with Wales forward Brennan Johnson receiving plenty of criticism
